name: Flipside
author: Poki
description: Defy gravity in Flipside! In this racing game made by Nitrome, you'll have to win every race against your opponents. If you're fast enough, your special motorbike will be able to drive on the ceiling. Use this tactic to bypass the other racers and win! There's 15 different races to beat. Got a friend nearby? Then you can play together in 2 player mode. Are you the fastest Flipside racer? How to play Flipside? Use A and D or the left and right arrow key to move! Use spacebar or the up arrow key to jump! Who created Flipside? Flipside is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Flipside for free? You can play Flipside for free on Poki. Can I play Flipside with my friend? Yes! Flipside is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer! Can I play Flipside on mobile devices and desktop? Flipside can be played on your computer only.
